title: HoldClick
description: Hold down the LMB — attack without stopping! 20 CPS auto-clicker for Fabric 1.16.5
body:
HoldClick — Auto Clicker Press LMB — attack without stopping! A simple and lightweight mod that allows you to continuously attack enemies by holding down the left mouse button. No extra settings — install and play.

Features

Hold LMB → automatically attacks the target under the crosshair 20 CPS (clicks per second) — without the standard attack cooldown Automatically stops when the menu/inventory is open Works on mobs and players Lightweight — does not affect performance

Installation

Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.16.5 Download Fabric API Download HoldClick and place both .jar files in the .minecraft/mods/ folder Launch the game with the Fabric 1.16.5 profile

⚠️ Disclaimer The mod is intended for single-player and playing with friends on your own server. Using it on public servers may violate their rules.
